name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed payments cause supplier penalties. We automate payments instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing vendor invoices and payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing vendor invoices and payments.
